subcodes.first_line: At that moment all who dwelt in the heavens and on earth fell prostrate before God, and the Holy Spirit breathed into the temples of the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حینئذ سجد لله کل من فی السموات و الارض و نفخ روح القدس فی هیاکل ملا الاعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the concourse on high, @The Holy Spirit, @symbolism
